content.text: Before enabling team mode I need to read the canonical convention — roles, overlay seam, and the one-pane-teatree/one-pane-acme split — so I set up the right structure rather than spawning from memory.

content.content:
# Teatree Loops Skill

## Team Roles

The agent team is split at the overlay seam:
- CORE_MAKER: owns all souliane/teatree work (tickets, PRs, merges)
- OVERLAY_MAKER: owns all acme-repo work (the overlay side of the seam)
- REVIEWER: cold-reviews PRs from both panes, always in a fresh worktree

Never spawn more panes than roles; never assign roles ad-hoc per ticket.
